original_snippet_context: Analysis of the proposed Caixa de Conversão and its London agency, focusing on exchange rate manipulation and potential impact on Brazil's finances.
relevant_quote: Esta peregrina operação tão fora dos moldes normaes do raciocínio financeiro [...] Depois de desvendado o segredo que no primitivo plano se alastrava — qual o de submetter á caixa a direcção suprema das manobras camblaes
justification: The author criticizes the Caixa's proposed involvement in exchange rate manipulation ('manobras camblaes'), viewing it as a departure from normal financial reasoning. This aligns with orthodox concerns about artificial interventions and potential damage to financial stability.
